summary: I can’t verify live posts, videos, tweets, or articles from today without web access in this chat, so I’m not able to reliably attribute fresh bullish or bearish calls to specific analysts right now. If you paste links or enable browsing, I can turn them into a clean 15+ token signal map immediately.
